scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @lead/shared && npm run build -w @lead/db
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @lead/worker && npm run build -w @lead/api && npm run build -w @lead/web
scripts.typecheck: ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc -b apps/web/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n api,worker,web "npm run dev -w @lead/api" "npm run dev -w @lead/worker" "npm run dev -w @lead/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @lead/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @lead/worker
